arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold told Real Madrid transfer will be 'good for him' by ex-Liverpool boss
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold continues to be linked with a move away from Liverpool with his contract expiring this summer and Real Madrid look like favourites to snap up the England right-back on a free transfer

arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Osasuna in La Liga. Real Madrid starting XI: Courtois, Valverde, Asencio, Tchouameni, Fran Garcia, Modric, Camavinga, Bellingham, Brahim, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Arsenal missed out on Cesc Fabregas 2.0 as Real Madrid star confirms transfer rejection
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Federico Valverde reveals that he turned down the chance to sign for Arsenal at the age of 16, as he was never interested in moving to England.

arts.ttl: Vinicius: to sell or renew, that is Real Madrid’s question
arts.sum: The question posed was was simple and direct: “Should Real Madrid renew or sell Vinicius to Saudi Arabia? Following an online survey conducted by AS, 57.6% of readers are in favour of transferring Vinicius to the Saudi Arabian top flight with the remaining 42.4% keen for the Brazilian to stay with Madrid despite the huge amount of money that would be used for his signature.

arts.ttl: Osasuna vs Real Madrid 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: The race for the 2024-25 La Liga title is as close as it’s been over the last few months, as Madrid lost momentum and crucial points. They will have to take this match in Pamplona very seriously if they don’t want to drop more points, so it will be important for Ancelotti to make sure that his players stay focused and engaged for this one.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Osasuna: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid take on Osasuna in La Liga just four days after a thrilling Champions League victory over Manchester City.
